XAUUSD 20-Strategy Experiment

Generated 2026-04-27 13:40  |  Data: 2026-01-21 → 2026-04-27 (3058 × 30-min bars)  |  20 long-only strategies  |  SL 0.5% / TP 1.0% / Max hold 48 bars
⚠ Data Coverage Notice This experiment runs on 3058 bars (~63 trading days) of 30-min OHLCV data. Results with fewer than ~20 trades should be treated as directional signals only, not statistically significant conclusions.

To validate these strategies properly:
  1. Copy the corresponding Pine Script from XAUUSD-Long-Experiments/pine/ into TradingView
  2. Run the backtest on the full XAUUSD 30-min history (2+ years)
  3. Export the trade CSV and drop it into this project for full analysis

Development Notes

Strategy Groups

  • Trend E01–E05: Follow the prevailing direction using EMA, MACD, Supertrend, ADX
  • Oscillator E06–E10: Enter on oversold bounces using RSI, Stochastic, CCI, Williams %R
  • BB E11–E13: Bollinger Band mean-reversion and trend-following setups
  • Breakout E14–E16: Enter on confirmed price breakouts above recent structure
  • Pattern E17–E19: Candle pattern recognition (Hammer, Engulfing, AO Saucer)
  • Confluence E20: Multi-factor entry requiring BB + RSI + Trend alignment

Scoring Methodology

Composite score = Win Rate (25%) + Profit Factor capped@3 (25%) + log(Trade Count) (20%) + Net P&L% (20%) + Consec. Loss penalty (10%). All components normalised 0–1 before weighting.

Risk Parameters (fixed across all strategies)

  • Stop Loss: 0.5% below entry
  • Take Profit: 1.0% above entry (2:1 R:R)
  • Max hold: 48 bars (24 hours) — exit at close
  • One trade at a time, no pyramiding

Pine Script Files

All 20 strategies have corresponding Pine Script v6 files in XAUUSD-Long-Experiments/pine/ ready to paste into TradingView for full historical backtesting.
